dbNotes.noOwnTables: Admin dashboard has no dedicated DB tables. All 4 endpoints return computed/aggregated data from other modules' tables.

queryDependencies.getDashboardMetrics: Aggregates from Lead (source counts), Trial (conversion rates), Enrollment (active count), Payment (status summary)
queryDependencies.getDashboardRecentLeads: SELECT from Lead ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5
queryDependencies.getDashboardUpcomingTrials: SELECT from Trial JOIN Program JOIN CalendarDate WHERE trialDate >= NOW() ORDER BY trialDate ASC
queryDependencies.getDashboardPendingPayments: SELECT from Payment JOIN Enrollment JOIN Program WHERE status IN (PENDING, PARTIAL)

dbNotes.realTimeComputation: AD-A-01: All metrics computed real-time on page load. No pre-aggregation or materialized views.
dbNotes.indexDependencies: Dashboard query performance depends on indexes defined in lead_management (Lead.createdAt, Lead.source), enrollment_trial (Enrollment.status, Trial.status), and payment_tracking (Payment.status).
